text:
Hello Johann,

Thank you for your email.

The ServerUX is a software thar run in the FreeBSD OS.

The best category for inclusion of my company is "Software".

Thank for all in advanced.

2012/2/12 Johann Kois <jkois@freebsd.org>

> Hello,
>
> thank you for your submission.  Looks like it meats the criteria to get
> included in our list.  But I am not really sure where to place it:
>
> - Seems you are offering FreeBSD consulting (http://soft.bsrpar.com/p/**
> consultoria.html <http://soft.bsrpar.com/p/consultoria.html>).
> - And then you offer "BSRSoft ServerUX" which seems to be a modified
> FreeBSD?  Or is this a software running on a normal FreeBSD?
> - And finally you are also providing some hosting services (although
> FreeBSD is not mentioned there).
>
> Problem is we can only include a company in 1 category.  And I am not sure
> which one to choose:
>
> - Consulting
> - Internet service provider
> - Software
>
> See http://www.freebsd.org/**commercial/<http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/>for information what these categories mean.  Do you have any preference?
>
> Regards
>
> jkois
>
> --
>  Johann Kois
>  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
>  FreeBSD Documentation Project
>  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
>
